{{Quote|My port of origin was Drog VI in the Corporate Sector.|[[Kyle Katarn]], under the alias of [[Kyle Katarn|Dan Drexel]]|<ref name="Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire">''[[Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire]]''</ref>}}
'''Drog VI''' was a [[Planet/Legends|trade world]] in the [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector's]] [[Drog system/Legends|Drog system]]. [[Etti]] ran several hunting lodges on the planet.

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire]]'' {{Mo}}
*[[Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire (audio drama)|''Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire'' audio drama]] {{Mo}}
